changes.summary: Resolved the add/add conflict by preserving base filename-sanitization tests and PR status-normalization tests in one suite.

behaviorReviewed: RunStore.record keeps the caller-provided run id as data while sanitizing only the filename.
RunStore.list skips persisted records with unknown status instead of normalizing them to success.
Legacy persisted status completed remains mapped to success.
Malformed/unknown persisted run status increments skipped count and does not create false proof.

verification.result: 17 pass, 0 fail, 71 expect() calls after bun install --frozen-lockfile restored workspace dependencies
301 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail, 1014 expect() calls; verify:v0 5/5; Mintlify validate and broken-links passed; Electron build passed; bun audit found no vulnerabilities

verification.command: OTTO_STAGING_APP=/Applications/otto-pr-44-staging.app OTTO_STAGING_ROOT=/tmp/otto-pr-44-staging-root OTTO_STAGING_BUNDLE_ID=haus.otto.desktop.pr44 OTTO_STAGING_DISPLAY_NAME="otto pr44" OTTO_STAGING_PORT=9544 OTTO_STAGING_LOG_CAPTURE_SECONDS=8 task staging
verification.result: Disposable app/profile proof passed; no /Applications/otto.app or /Applications/otto-staging.app mutation.

caveats: An earlier proof attempt used OTTO_STAGING_HOME, which the script does not read; that run is not counted as disposable-profile proof.
The final app log contains normal macOS AppIntents/LaunchServices sandbox noise; no otto-specific fatal runtime error was identified in the captured startup log.
